basic_details.job_title: District & Sessions Judge Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Record Keeper, Steno and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills
basic_details.short_information: District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills has published the Various Posts Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. DSJ/WJH/472/DSPC/2025/115. The recruitment drive aims to fill 8 positions in different categories. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 32 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST candidates) and holding educational qualifications ranging from SSLC Pass to a Bachelor's Degree with Diploma in Stenography, depending on the post applied for, are eligible to apply through offline mode. The application process is currently active and will remain open until 15-06-2026. Candidates c

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18, Max: 32 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age relaxation is applicable by 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Educational qualifications range from Bachelor's Degree with Diploma in Stenography to SSLC passed.
qualification.details: Stenographer Gr-III: Bachelor Degree from a recognized University with Diploma in Stenography in English, Minimum speed of 80 wpm in Shorthand, Typing Speed of 40 wpm in computer. Assistant Librarian: Bachelor Degree or Diploma in Library Science from a recognized University and proficiency in the use of computer. Lower Division Clerk-Cum-Bench Assistant: Bachelor Degree from a recognized University and proficiency in the use of computer. Record Keeper: SSLC passed from a recognized Board. Process Server: SSLC passed from a recognized Board.

salary_details.details: Stenographer Gr-III: Level-8 Rs. 30,300/- Assistant Librarian: Level-5 Rs. 24,700/- Lower Division Clerk-Cum-Bench Assistant: Level-5 Rs. 24,700/- Record Keeper: Level-1 Rs. 17,400/- Process Server: Level-1 Rs. 17,400/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the various posts in the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Various Posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for various posts in the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills. These include Stenographer Gr-III, Assistant Librarian, Lower Division Clerk-Cum-Bench Assistant, Record Keeper, and Process Server.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification ranges from SSLC passed for posts like Record Keeper and Process Server, up to a Bachelor's Degree with a Diploma in Stenography for the Stenographer Gr-III post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for these posts is between 18 to 32 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST candidates, who can avail of a 5-year relaxation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General category candidates is Rs. 300/-, while for SC & ST category candidates, it is Rs. 150/-. This fee is payable by Demand Draft.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the various posts in the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills will involve a Written Examination followed by a Personal Interview. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered for appointment.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in offline mode. Candidates need to fill out the standard application form, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary structure varies based on the post. It ranges from Level-1 (Rs. 17,400/-) for posts like Record Keeper and Process Server, to Level-5 (Rs. 24,700/-) for Assistant Librarian and LDC-Cum-Bench Assistant, and Level-8 (Rs. 30,300/-) for Stenographer Gr-III.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be downloaded from the official website of the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills or through the direct links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Along with the duly filled application form, candidates must attach self-attested copies of Educational Qualification/Experience Certificates, Caste Certificate, Birth Certificate/Age Proof, and Proof of residence, along with two recent passport-size photographs and a self-attested envelope with postage stamps.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the various posts in the District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.
